title: rubus pubescens subsp. macrostemon
intro: Rubus pubescens subsp. macrostemon, also known as the American black raspberry, is a subspecies of the black raspberry plant, characterized by its dark purple fruit and thorny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rubus pubescens subsp. macrostemon include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or juice, and its extracts can be used in herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
